caption: Step 1: Open Screener.in - India's popular stock research platform
description: Open Screener.in - India's popular stock research platform
narration: We start on Screener, which gets us from ticker to business story without wasting motion.
fallback_narration: We open Screener and set the stage.

caption: Step 2: Navigate directly to Reliance Industries company page
description: Navigate directly to Reliance Industries company page
narration: Rather than wander, we go straight to Reliance and start with a company most viewers already recognize.
fallback_narration: Straight to Reliance so the analysis starts fast.

caption: Step 3: View key metrics - market cap, PE ratio, ROCE, and valuation snapshot
description: View key metrics - market cap, PE ratio, ROCE, and valuation snapshot
narration: This first block is the trailer: size, valuation, and return ratios in one quick glance.
fallback_narration: This top block gives us the market snapshot.

caption: Step 4: Review quarterly financial trends to understand recent performance
description: Review quarterly financial trends to understand recent performance
narration: Now we drop into the recent quarters, because the latest chapters matter more than the cover page.
fallback_narration: Quarterly numbers tell us what changed recently.

caption: Step 5: Inspect Profit and Loss details - revenue, expenses, and margins
description: Inspect Profit and Loss details - revenue, expenses, and margins
narration: Profit and Loss tells us whether revenue is becoming a real business, not just a headline.
fallback_narration: Profit and Loss shows how sales turn into earnings.

caption: Step 6: Check balance sheet strength - assets, liabilities, and equity
description: Check balance sheet strength - assets, liabilities, and equity
narration: Then we check the balance sheet, where leverage and resilience stop being opinions.
fallback_narration: Balance sheet tells us how sturdy the company looks.

caption: Step 7: Open the Public Screens page to explore ready-made stock filters
description: Open the Public Screens page to explore ready-made stock filters
narration: Now we switch from one-company analysis to idea generation, and that is where Public Screens earns its keep.
fallback_narration: Now we jump to Public Screens for idea generation.

caption: Step 8: Open a public screen to view companies matching prebuilt criteria
description: Open a public screen to view companies matching prebuilt criteria
narration: A public screen is basically a ready-made hypothesis. One click, and the market starts shortlisting itself.
fallback_narration: A public screen gives us a ready-made shortlist.

caption: Step 9: Browse filtered companies and compare PE, ROE, and market cap
description: Browse filtered companies and compare PE, ROE, and market cap
narration: Now the table becomes a comparison board: valuation, returns, and size sitting side by side.
fallback_narration: Here the table turns into a side-by-side comparison.

caption: Step 10: Open Ganesh Infra. from the screen for deeper analysis
description: Open Ganesh Infra. from the screen for deeper analysis
narration: From the shortlist, we open one company and turn a filter result into actual research.
fallback_narration: Open one result and go deeper.

caption: Step 11: Tutorial complete - you can now research and compare stocks on Screener.in
description: Tutorial complete - you can now research and compare stocks on Screener.in
narration: Final beat. We went from one company page to a reusable stock-research rhythm.
